_meta.note: Skill library — Basic tier (in progress toward the full pool CLASSES.md §1.5 assembles from). Each class draws ~6-10, ~half unique. effect types implemented by the combat rules engine: power/heal/defUp/maxHp/evade/critUp. Other effect types (craft/gather/lockpick/social/etc.) are DATA HOOKS for systems built later (crafting, survival, social).

track.name: Track
track.desc: Read your quarry's movements — it takes more damage (mark).

sneak.name: Sneak
sneak.desc: Slip out of sight — you become harder to strike (def up).

pick_lock.name: Find the Gap
pick_lock.desc: Pick apart its guard — armor sundered.

set_snare.name: Set Snare
set_snare.desc: Snare the target's footing — it slows.

_comment_smith_tree: Skills for the full Smith lineage (CLASSES.md Smith tree). High-tier forge signatures are selfTeachable:false (class-only). tags[] feed evolution requires; toolRequired enables self-teach (SKILLS.md §1.5).
_comment_leather: Hide/leather line — the canonical self-teach example (knife -> skinning). Leatherworker base class crafts leather/hide armor (CLASSES.md crafter family).
